category_sources: source_facts.description says coarray Fortran ABI, API, and compiler wrapper; official README says OpenCoarrays provides a parallel ABI for Fortran compilers.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and project homepage use OpenCoarrays.
docs_sources: Official README points users to INSTALL.md and GETTING_STARTED.md for installation and getting started.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/sourceryinstitute/OpenCoarrays; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README topics and overview identify Fortran, Coarray Fortran, HPC, MPI, and parallel computing; source_facts.description confirms coarray Fortran.
